# Bay Crest Media

> Marketing for real estate agents in the San Francisco Bay Area. Websites, Google review management, listing content, and lead capture (missed-call text-back and 24/7 AI chat), so agents stay top of mind and spend their time selling homes. Run by one person, Jason, no agency.

## About
Bay Crest Media is a local marketing service led by Jason, who spent 25 years in tech and support before starting it. It works mostly with real estate agents, and with other local Bay Area businesses too. Everything is month to month with no contracts, and clients work directly with Jason, no account managers or handoffs.

## Services
- Never Miss a Lead: missed-call text-back and 24/7 AI chat so no lead goes unanswered, on the phone, the website, or social messages. From $99 a month.
- Google Review Management: an automated, honest system that invites every client and replies to reviews weekly. $97/mo standard, $249/mo premium, plus a $299 setup. Reviews are never bought, gated, or faked.
- Websites: custom, fast, mobile-friendly sites that are built, hosted, and maintained. $1,497 or $2,497 to build, $97 or $149 a month for care.
- Listing and Social Content: platform-ready posts and reels created from a quick update. $997 to $2,500 a month.
- Local Presence Package: a website and review management together. $1,697 setup plus $179 a month.
